text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The unsettled feeling Mihono Bourbon has been
experiencing doesn't abate. Her condition and
lap times deteriorate, and it all comes to a head
when she collapses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While recovering, she comes across Rice Shower
undergoing intense training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower says that she wants to defeat Mihono
Bourbon, whom she looks up to. Her
determination to win pushes her to change and
become stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon, who harbors the same
emotions, realizes that the true nature of the
unsettled feeling she's been experiencing is
actually her "desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After this revelation, she recovers in the blink of
an eye.
